## Alternatives considered

## Phase fit

polylocale ships in phases (see [`docs/PROJECT.md`](../../docs/PROJECT.md)):

- [ ] **Phase 1** — Flutter formats (ARB, flat JSON, nested JSON), tabular editor, AI translation
- [ ] **Phase 2** — Web formats (i18next, FormatJS)
- [ ] **Phase 3** — Native formats (iOS strings, Android XML)
- [ ] **Cross-phase** — DX, performance, security, accessibility

Which phase does this belong to? If it crosses phases, say so.
